sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLPROXYINFO WHERE PROXYUSERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND StartDate < #nowDate# AND EndDate > #nowDate# ) > 0

select.isEqual: SELECT REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;','a=1;') as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT $v_FIELD$ FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT $v_FIELD$ FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT $v_FIELD$ FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15

SELECT A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.TYPE FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , 'dept' TYPE , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLADDJOBMASTER B JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLADDJOBMASTER B JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY TYPE DESC, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME ASC

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC ) ROWNUM_ , CN , DISPLAYNAME , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , TYPE FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLADDJOBMASTER B JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ) BB WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_STARTROW# AND ROWNUM_ < #v_ENDROW# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'DEPT' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLADDJOBMASTER B JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' '))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ' ') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'DEPT' TYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY TYPE DESC, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(CN) TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT B.CN FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBLUSERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AA

SELECT CN , CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DEPTNM , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'dept' TYPE , TENANT_ID as tenantId FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , MOBILE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , POSITIONCD FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTCD# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.MAIL , C.CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1 , C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2 , A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1 , C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE , B.TITLE TITLE1 , B.TITLE2 TITLE2 , A.TELEPHONENUMBER , A.HOMEPHONE , A.MOBILE , A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , A.STREETADDRESS , A.INFO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , A.ADSPATH , A.UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , B.POSITIONCD FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLADDJOBMASTER B JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.DEPTID = #v_DEPTCD# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;', 'a=1;') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLADDJOBMASTER A JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_PCN# AND A.DEPTID = #v_PDEPT# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER SET $v_PROPNAME$ = #v_PROPVALUE# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER SET $v_PROPNAME$ = #v_PROPVALUE# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.statement: MERGE INTO EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER USING ( SELECT TBLUSERMASTER.ROWID ROW_ID, TBLDEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME, TBLDEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER ON TBLUSERMASTER.DEPARTMENT = TBLDEPTMASTER.CN AND TBLUSERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBLDEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBLDEPTMASTER.CN = #v_CN# AND TBLDEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND TBLDEPTMASTER ) src ON ( TBLUSERMASTER.ROWID = src.ROW_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DESCRIPTION = src.DISPLAYNAME, DESCRIPTION2 = src.DISPLAYNAME2
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZHRASTER.TBLPROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) > 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZHRMASTER.TBLPROXYINFO SET PROXYUSERID = #v_PROXYUSERID#, PROXYUSERNAME = #v_PROXYUSERNAME#, PROXYUSERDEPTID = #v_PROXYUSERDEPTID#, STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZHRMASTER.TBLPROXYINFO ( USERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, #v_PROXYUSERID#, #v_PROXYUSERNAME#, #v_PROXYUSERDEPTID#, TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZHRMASTER.TBLPROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , BIRTHTYPE , BIRTH , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND NVL(BIRTH, ' ') <> ' ' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY substr(birth, 8, 10)

select.isEqual:
SELECT cn, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER B INNER JOIN ezHrmaster.TBLADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID $strSQL$
UNION ALL
SELECT cn, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT cn, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER $strSQL$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by CN) as RNUM, cn, displayName, extensionAttribute15, type FROM (SELECT cn, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT a.cn , deptid as displayName , '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUserMaster b INNER JOIN ezHrmaster.TBLADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn $strSQL$ AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) A) B where RNUM >= $startRow$ and RNUM < $endRow$

SELECT cn, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER A $strSQL$ $strSize$ AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER B INNER JOIN ezHrmaster.TBLADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN $strSQL$ AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT CN, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER $strSize$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT cn, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER $strSQL$ $strSize$ AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER B INNER JOIN ezHrmaster.TBLAddJobMaster A ON a.cn = b.cn $strSQL$ and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) A
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDeptmaster WHERE extensionattribute1 = #deptID# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT 'top,Top,' || dept_cd_path FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #deptID# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn , cn deptid , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END displayname, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END deptnm, displayname displayname1 , displayname2 , mail , extensionattribute1 , extensionattribute2 , extensionattribute3 , extensionattribute4 , extensionattribute5 , extensionattribute6 , extensionattribute7 , extensionattribute8 , extensionattribute9 , extensionattribute10 , extensionattribute11 , extensionattribute12 , extensionattribute13 , extensionattribute14 , extensionattribute15 , adspath , updatedt , 'dept' type FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT password FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT cn FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE mail = #email# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT lastLogin FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT CN , TENANT_ID tenantId FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUserMaster WHERE TENANT_ID = #TENANTID# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%a=1;%'
